headline: Wells Fargo Cuts Aptiv (APTV) Price Target After $1.35B Notes Tender Offer
summary: Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) is among the 10 best non-tech stocks to buy and hold for 5 years. On March 11, Wells Fargo lowered its price target on Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) to $95 from $102 while maintaining an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm noted that Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) is up 5% year-to-date, higher than […]
